water_temperature_c.description: Temperature assigned to the liquid-water Debye parameters

ice_temperature_c.description: Temperature assigned to the ice Debye parameters

room_temperature_k.description: Temperature used for the kBT comparison

water_static_relative_permittivity.description: Selected static relative permittivity of liquid water

water_high_frequency_relative_permittivi.description: Selected effective one-pole background relative permittivity of liquid water

ice_static_relative_permittivity.description: Selected approximate static relative permittivity of ice

ice_high_frequency_relative_permittivity.description: Selected approximate high-frequency relative permittivity of ice

ice_relaxation_frequency_khz.description: Selected dielectric relaxation frequency of ice at minus 10 degrees Celsius

ice_relaxation_time_s.description: Ice relaxation time derived from the selected relaxation frequency

high_evaluation_frequency_ghz.description: Selected single-Debye extrapolation frequency above the liquid-water dielectric-loss-factor peak

speed_of_light_m_per_s.description: Speed of light used by the attenuation calculation

planck_constant_j_s.description: Planck constant used by the photon-energy comparison

elementary_charge_c.description: Elementary charge used to convert joules to electronvolts

boltzmann_constant_j_per_k.description: Boltzmann constant used by the thermal-energy comparison

water_dielectric_loss_peak_frequency_ghz.description: Frequency of the liquid-water Debye dielectric-loss-factor maximum

photon_energy_microev.description: Photon energy at the selected oven frequency

thermal_energy_mev.description: kBT at the selected room temperature

photon_to_thermal_energy_ratio.description: Photon energy divided by kBT at the selected oven frequency and temperature

thermal_to_photon_energy_ratio.description: kBT divided by photon energy at the selected oven frequency and temperature

photon_energy_orders_below_kbt.description: Base-10 orders by which photon energy is below kBT

ice_to_water_relaxation_ratio.description: Ice relaxation time divided by liquid-water relaxation time

ice_to_water_relaxation_orders.description: Base-10 orders separating the selected ice and water relaxation times

water_oven_loss_angle_deg.description: Liquid-water dielectric loss angle at the oven frequency

water_dielectric_loss_peak_penetration_d.description: Liquid-water 1/e power penetration depth at the Debye dielectric-loss-factor peak

water_0915_frequency_ghz.description: Display frequency for the 915 MHz liquid-water row

water_0915_relative_permittivity_real.description: Real relative permittivity of liquid water at 915 MHz

water_0915_relative_permittivity_loss.description: Loss relative permittivity of liquid water at 915 MHz

water_0915_loss_tangent.description: Loss tangent of liquid water at 915 MHz

water_0915_penetration_depth_cm.description: Liquid-water 1/e power penetration depth at 915 MHz

water_245_relative_permittivity_real.description: Real relative permittivity of liquid water at 2.45 GHz

water_245_relative_permittivity_loss.description: Loss relative permittivity of liquid water at 2.45 GHz

water_245_loss_tangent.description: Loss tangent of liquid water at 2.45 GHz

water_245_penetration_depth_cm.description: Liquid-water 1/e power penetration depth at 2.45 GHz

water_dielectric_loss_peak_relative_perm.description: Real relative permittivity of liquid water at its Debye dielectric-loss-factor peak
Loss relative permittivity of liquid water at its Debye dielectric-loss-factor peak

water_dielectric_loss_peak_loss_tangent.description: Loss tangent of liquid water at its Debye dielectric-loss-factor peak

water_dielectric_loss_peak_penetration_d.description: Liquid-water 1/e power penetration depth at its Debye dielectric-loss-factor peak

water_60_relative_permittivity_real.description: Real relative permittivity of liquid water at 60 GHz

water_60_relative_permittivity_loss.description: Loss relative permittivity of liquid water at 60 GHz

water_60_loss_tangent.description: Loss tangent of liquid water at 60 GHz

water_60_penetration_depth_cm.description: Liquid-water 1/e power penetration depth at 60 GHz

ice_245_relative_permittivity_real.description: Real relative permittivity of ice at 2.45 GHz

ice_245_relative_permittivity_loss.description: Loss relative permittivity of ice at 2.45 GHz

ice_245_loss_tangent.description: Loss tangent of ice at 2.45 GHz

ice_245_penetration_depth_m.description: Ice 1/e power penetration depth at 2.45 GHz

ice_245_omega_tau.description: Dimensionless omega tau for ice at 2.45 GHz

peak_condition_absolute_tolerance.description: Absolute tolerance used by the omega tau peak-condition check

peak_loss_relative_tolerance.description: Relative tolerance used by the peak-loss identity check

water_dielectric_loss_peak_condition_wit.description: Whether the computed dielectric-loss-factor peak satisfies omega tau equals one within tolerance

water_dielectric_loss_peak_identity_with.description: Whether dielectric loss at its peak equals half the dielectric strength within tolerance

water_oven_rows_match.description: Whether independent liquid-water evaluations at 2.45 GHz match exactly

all_evaluations_physical.description: Whether every evaluated row has finite, positive loss and attenuation quantities

ice_relaxation_slower_than_water.description: Whether the selected ice relaxation time exceeds the liquid-water value
